title: Question: public access to the module #parameter block from C++
body:
---


Author Name: **Bulent Abali**
Original Redmine Message: 1059 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Greetings
I am trying to read a module's parameter constants from the C++ class

For example
module my_module
  #(
     parameter
     bitlen = 3,...

On the C++ side, I would like to be able to do read (but not write) the parameter e.g. like (Vmymodule *top)->bitlen.

The problem is that I cannot find 'bitlen' declaration in any of the generated *.h or *.cpp files.
Second if I add /* verilator public */ anywhere in the #( ) block, Verilator complains.

I searched forums but came up empty.  Any suggestions are much appreciated.

B. Abali
